<p>Plivo enables its users (“they”, “their”, “you” or “your”), via its website (<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com"><strong><u>https://www.plivo.com</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://console.plivo.com"><strong><u>https://console.plivo.com</u></strong></a>) (the “Website”), its API, its services or other means, to use and access Plivo Platform and Plivo Applications, (collectively, the “Plivo Cloud Platform”). The Plivo Cloud Platform operated by Plivo and/or its affiliates (“its”, “Plivo”, “we” or “us”).</p><p>Your use of Plivo Cloud Platform is subject to the terms and conditions set forth in these Terms of Service (the “Plivo ToS”) and applicable Service Schedule.</p><p>PLEASE READ THE TERMS OF SERVICE CAREFULLY. BY ACCESSING OR USING THE SERVICES, YOU ACKNOWLEDGE THAT YOU HAVE READ, UNDERSTOOD, AND AGREE TO BE BOUND TO ALL THE TERMS OF PLIVO TERMS OF SERVICE, which shall include&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/privacy/"><strong><u>Privacy</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/aup/"><strong><u>Acceptable Use Policy</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/ai-addendum/"><u>Artificial Intelligence Services Addendum</u></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/subprocessors/"><strong><u>Subprocessors</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/sla/"><strong><u>Service Level &amp; Support</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/services-schedule/"><strong><u>Services Schedule</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/responsible-disclosure/"><strong><u>Responsible Disclosure Policy</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/law-enforcement/"><strong><u>Law Enforcement Guidelines,&nbsp;</u></strong></a><a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/security/"><strong><u>Plivo Security Overview</u></strong></a>,&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/copyright/"><strong><u>Copyright Infringement Notification</u></strong></a>&nbsp;or any other documentation as indicated by Plivo from time to time. IF YOU DO NOT AGREE TO THESE TERMS, EXIT THIS PAGE AND DO NOT ACCESS OR USE THE SERVICES.</p><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="holo"><p>If you open an account on behalf of a company, organization, or other entity, then (a) “you” includes you and that entity, and (b) you represent and warrant that you are authorized to grant all permissions and licenses provided in these Terms and bind the entity to these Terms, and that you agree to these Terms on the entity’s behalf.</p><p>As a customer, you agree to incorporate Plivo’s policies into your own solutions and ensure that your customers adhere to our policies. If you are accepting these terms of service on behalf of your employer or another entity, you represent and warrant that: (i) you have full legal authority to bind your employer, or the applicable entity, to these Terms of Service; (ii) you have read and understand these Terms of Service; and (iii) you agree, on behalf of the party that you represent, to these terms of Service.</p><p>If you have a separate written services agreement with Plivo for your use of the Services, then in case of conflict the terms of said written service agreement shall apply, unless that written agreement does not cover a particular Service, in which case, these Plivo Terms of Service apply solely to your use of that particular Service. . If you, as the Customer, are domiciled in India and are requesting and/or using Services within India, the contracting entity for purposes of this Agreement shall be Plivo Services India Private Limited. All rights, obligations, and responsibilities under the&nbsp;<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://www.plivo.com/legal/tos/"><strong><u>Terms of Service</u></strong></a>&nbsp;shall be construed accordingly.</p>
